title: 'Abiyhayil #0032
definition:
Abihail = "my father is might"

 1) a Levite in Moses's time
 2) a Gadite
 3) father of Esther
 4) wife of Abishur
 5) wife of Rehoboam
nasbUsage:
Definition: Abihail = "my father is might"

 1) a Levite in Moses's time
 2) a Gadite
 3) father of Esther
 4) wife of Abishur
 5) wife of Rehoboam

    NASB:  my father is might, an Isr. name
